Label: STR_7_53C
English:
Bugsite is a world inside the Internet, divided into four parts:
Amiland and its areas, ran by land-based company FE.
Sealand and its areas, ran by sea-based company Sting.
Airland and its areas, ran by air-based company Ruger.
And Energyland, from energy-based company Tahiro.
Those four make up this world.
This is Ami Techno Area, which means it’s a Techno Area in Amiland managed by FE.

Label: STR_B_497
English:
Dad:
The Bug List is a list that shows the different Bugs you’ve collected.
You can check it by selecting the Bug List in the Mobile menu.
Completing it is the most important thing for a Hacker!
Bugs can be caught using a Vaccine.
During battle, if you use a Vaccine on the Bug you wanna catch, there’s a chance to remove their viruses.
If all viruses are removed, that Bug can become your ally. There are various kinds of Vaccines.
If a vaccine seems to be not very effective, you can increase its effectiveness by weakening the target Bug before using it. 
Just catching the Bug is no good. You have to equip a Chip to them and add them to your party.
A party can include up to three Bugs.
It can be set up through the Mobile Menu.
Vaccines, Chips, and so on are all items you can buy from a Shop at Bugsite!
If you forget any of this, go to the Beginner’s House in Ami Techno Area and all your questions will be answered.
You're still a B-Class Hacker, but if you increase your rank, it will become easier to catch more Bugs.
Increase your rank, catch more Bugs, fill out your Bug List, and you'll likely become the strongest Hacker around.
Do your best, [name]!
